description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a bald head, standing with arms crossed over the torso. The figure is dressed in a fitted, sleeveless top and tight pants, both of which are simple in design and lack visible seams or accessories. The body proportions are realistic, with defined musculature in the arms and legs, and the stance is relaxed yet confident. The shoes are plain and streamlined, covering the feet completely. The facial features are minimal but clearly defined, giving the figure a neutral expression. The overall appearance suggests a casual pedestrian suitable for urban environments.
description: A bald adult male figure stands with arms crossed, wearing a sleeveless top, fitted pants, and plain shoes. The style is simple and realistic, with a neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the crossed arms, bald head, and full outfit including the sleeveless top and fitted pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the arm position, and the slim fit of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shoulders, and the fit of the pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm position and body posture from the opposite profile.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted shirt and tight pants
